title: stelis phaeomelana
intro: Stelis phaeomelana is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America, belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Stelis phaeomelana has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Stelis phaeomelana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
